positive: A majestic, bioluminescent forest scene featuring stylized, oversized flora and fauna. The central motif is a stylized, silhouette of a gentle woodland creature (like a fox or deer) interacting with glowing, geometric leaves and oversized mushrooms. The style should be intricate linocut and vaporwave influenced, with deep indigo and cyan glowing accents against a rich black background. Emphasis on clean, bold lines and high contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for a repeating seamless pattern or a single large chest print. Focus on symmetry and wearable art aesthetics. High detail, vector art quality, suitable for textile printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, logos, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoonish, realistic photo, gradient, noise, blurry, grainy, washed out, bright sky, harsh lighting
